title: Halloween 151 Multi Purpose Spray Paint 400ml Black Matt
features: Versatile Application: Ideal for painting wood, plastic, and metal surfaces with ease
Matte Finish: Provides a smooth, non-glossy look that's perfect for both indoor and outdoor use
Quick Drying: Allows for fast, multiple coats and a quick completion of your project
Generous Coverage: Approximately 10-12 square feet per 400ml coat for extensive coverage
Easy to Use: Aerosol can design ensures simple and controlled application
